reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(a)(2)(ii) requires an emergency access procedure, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that there are specific RBAC roles configured for emergency access, that such procedures are documented and auditable, and that any credentials used for emergency access are protected as secrets. Additionally, audit logs should capture emergency access events to ensure compliance and traceability.
title: 164_312_a_2_ii: 164.312(a)(2)(ii) Emergency access procedure
